_note: X / Twitter handles you trust. Paste your @KryptonAi follow list here (or a curated subset). The hunt pipeline boosts a news item's Social score when people on this list discuss it — so a tweet from a trusted voice counts far more than 1,000 random mentions.
_howToPopulate: Open https://x.com/KryptonAi/following, copy all handles, paste them as strings into the 'handles' array. No @ prefix needed.
